title: Smooth Doom
description: Adds newly drawn intermediate animation frames to every monster, weapon, and projectile in Doom. The end result is buttery-smooth sprite motion — the most-installed gameplay-adjacent Doom mod by a wide margin. Pairs with anything.
notes: [Doomworld thread](https://www.doomworld.com/forum/topic/69451-smooth-doom-update-41420/) • [Doom Wiki](https://doomwiki.org/wiki/Smooth_Doom) • GZDoom only. Mirror hosted via the 1x-1 community archive on archive.org.
